chapter_title.en: Chapter on the First and Final Departure From Mina

text: 3024 - وَ رَوَى عَنْهُ مُعَاوِيَةُ بْنُ عَمَّارٍ قَالَ : «يَنْبَغِي لِمَنْ «تَعَجَّلَ فِي يَوْمَيْنِ» أَنْ يُمْسِكَ عَنِ اَلصَّيْدِ حَتَّى يَنْقَضِيَ اَلْيَوْمُ اَلثَّالِثُ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.3024 - Mu'awiyah ibn Ammar narrated from Imam Abu Abdullah (as), who said:
"It is appropriate for one who 'hastens in two days' to refrain from hunting until the third day has passed."
